positive: A whimsical forest scene silhouette, featuring stylized woodland creatures like deer, foxes, and hummingbirds interacting with giant, bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate floral elements. The composition should be centrally focused, creating a striking circular or crest design. Use deep jewel tones (emerald green, sapphire blue, amethyst purple) contrasted with stark black silhouettes and pops of glowing cyan/gold for the bioluminescence. The style should be a detailed, high-contrast woodcut engraving meets modern graphic tattoo art, optimized for single-color screen printing effect on fabric. Highly detailed, vector art quality, clean lines, perfect symmetry, mystical atmosphere, high contrast.
negative: photorealistic, complex details, blur, fuzzy, watermark, logo, text, signature, extra limbs, poor anatomy, malformed, noise, grayscale, monochrome, low contrast, grainy, jpeg artifacts, bright white background
